description: Tracker Stats Backend - .NET 10 hexagonal API to manage torrent tracker integrations, exposing REST endpoints and auto-syncing stats hourly via a background job

userStories.title: Set up solution with hexagonal architecture project structure
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the codebase organized in hexagonal architecture so that domain logic is decoupled from infrastructure and delivery.
acceptanceCriteria: Solution file TrackerStats.sln exists at the root
Project TrackerStats.Domain exists with no external dependencies (no EF Core, no ASP.NET)
Project TrackerStats.Application exists and references only TrackerStats.Domain
Project TrackerStats.Infrastructure exists and references Domain and Application
Project TrackerStats.Api exists and references all three projects
docker-compose.yml exists at root with the API service and a volume for the SQLite .db file
Typecheck/build passes

userStories.title: Define domain plugin contract types
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a well-defined plugin interface so that any tracker can be integrated without changing the core system.
acceptanceCriteria: Interface ITrackerPlugin exists in TrackerStats.Domain with: string PluginId, string DisplayName, AuthMode AuthMode, Task<TrackerStats> FetchStatsAsync(TrackerCredentials credentials, CancellationToken ct)
Record TrackerStats exists in TrackerStats.Domain with: decimal Ratio, long UploadedBytes, long DownloadedBytes
Record TrackerCredentials exists in TrackerStats.Domain with: string BaseUrl, string? Username, string? Password, string? Cookie
Enum AuthMode exists in TrackerStats.Domain with values UsernamePassword and Cookie
None of these types reference any infrastructure or framework libraries
Typecheck/build passes

userStories.title: Define domain integration entity and repository interface
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a domain entity and repository interface for integrations so that use cases can persist and retrieve tracker integrations.
acceptanceCriteria: Class/record Integration exists in TrackerStats.Domain/Entities with: Guid Id, string PluginId, string Name, string BaseUrl, string? Username, string? Password, string? Cookie, DateTime? LastSyncAt, decimal? Ratio, long? UploadedBytes, long? DownloadedBytes

Interface IIntegrationRepository exists in TrackerStats.Domain/Repositories with methods: Task<Integration> AddAsync(Integration integration, CancellationToken ct), Task<IReadOnlyList<Integration>> ListAsync(CancellationToken ct), Task<Integration?> GetByIdAsync(Guid id, CancellationToken ct), Task UpdateAsync(Integration integration, CancellationToken ct), Task DeleteAsync(Guid id, CancellationToken ct)
Typecheck/build passes

userStories.title: Implement SQLite persistence with EF Core
userStories.description: As a developer, I want data stored in SQLite so that the system is easy to run locally without external dependencies.
acceptanceCriteria: TrackerStats.Infrastructure references EF Core with SQLite provider
AppDbContext exists with DbSet<Integration> Integrations
IntegrationRepository implements IIntegrationRepository using AppDbContext
EF Core migrations are generated and applied automatically on startup via Database.MigrateAsync()
SQLite .db file path is configurable via appsettings.json (key: ConnectionStrings:DefaultConnection or similar)
Typecheck/build passes

userStories.title: Implement plugin registry with FakeTrackerPlugin
userStories.description: As a developer, I want plugins to be registered via dependency injection so that the system discovers them automatically at startup.
acceptanceCriteria: Interface ITrackerPluginRegistry exists in TrackerStats.Domain with method ITrackerPlugin? GetById(string pluginId)
TrackerPluginRegistry in TrackerStats.Infrastructure implements ITrackerPluginRegistry by resolving all ITrackerPlugin instances from DI
GetById returns null when pluginId is not found
FakeTrackerPlugin exists in TrackerStats.Infrastructure implementing ITrackerPlugin, returning static or random stats
FakeTrackerPlugin implements one AuthMode.UsernamePassword variant and one AuthMode.Cookie variant (two fake plugins registered)
All plugins and registry are registered in the DI container in Program.cs
Typecheck/build passes

userStories.title: Implement GET /api/plugins endpoint
userStories.description: As a frontend developer, I want to list available tracker plugins so that the user can choose which tracker to add.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/plugins returns 200 OK with array of { pluginId, displayName, authMode }
authMode is returned as string: 'UsernamePassword' or 'Cookie'
The list reflects exactly the plugins registered in DI
Typecheck/build passes

userStories.title: Implement POST /api/integrations endpoint
userStories.description: As a user, I want to add a new tracker integration so that the system can start collecting my stats.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/integrations accepts body: { pluginId, name, baseUrl, username?, password?, cookie? }
Returns 201 Created with the created integration object including generated id
Returns 400 Bad Request if pluginId does not exist in the registry
Returns 400 Bad Request if required credential fields for the plugin's authMode are missing (UsernamePassword requires username+password; Cookie requires cookie)
Integration is persisted in SQLite
Typecheck/build passes

userStories.title: Implement GET /api/integrations endpoint
userStories.description: As a frontend developer, I want to list all integrations so that the dashboard can display each tracker's info.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/integrations returns 200 OK with array of objects: { id, pluginId, name, baseUrl, lastSyncAt, stats: { ratio, uploadedBytes, downloadedBytes } | null }
Credentials (username, password, cookie) are NOT included in the response
Integrations without synced stats return with stats: null
Typecheck/build passes

userStories.title: Implement DELETE /api/integrations/{id} endpoint
userStories.description: As a user, I want to remove a tracker integration so that it no longer appears in my dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: DELETE /api/integrations/{id} returns 204 No Content on success
Returns 404 Not Found if the integration does not exist
The integration is removed from SQLite
Typecheck/build passes

userStories.title: Implement POST /api/integrations/{id}/sync endpoint
userStories.description: As a user, I want to trigger a sync for a specific tracker so that I can refresh its data on demand.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/integrations/{id}/sync triggers FetchStatsAsync for that integration
Returns 200 OK with updated stats after sync
Returns 404 Not Found if the integration does not exist
Returns 502 Bad Gateway if the plugin throws an exception when fetching data (with error message)
lastSyncAt is updated in the database after a successful sync
Typecheck/build passes

userStories.title: Implement background sync job (every 1 hour)
userStories.description: As a user, I want my tracker stats to be refreshed automatically every hour so that the dashboard always shows up-to-date data.
acceptanceCriteria: A BackgroundService (TrackerSyncJob) exists in TrackerStats.Infrastructure that runs on a configurable interval
Default interval is 60 minutes, configurable via appsettings.json (e.g. SyncJob:IntervalMinutes)
Each execution iterates all registered integrations and calls FetchStatsAsync for each
Errors on individual trackers are caught and logged; they do not interrupt sync of remaining trackers
Stats and lastSyncAt are updated in the database after each successful sync
BackgroundService is registered in Program.cs
Typecheck/build passes
